text_excerpt: Keep Parking Free in Daventry - Sign the Petition! | Stuart Andrew Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Stuart Contact Stuart Keep Parking Free in Daventry - Sign the Petition! Keep Parking Free in Daventry - Sign the Petition! Tweet Daventry’s car parks have always been free, helping families, visitors, and local businesses. Proposed charges could make it harder for people to access the town and put extra pressure on traders and residents. Free parking supports our town centre and keeps Daventry accessible for everyone. If you agree, please add your name to this petition to show your support. The proposed carparks affected: Brook Street, Chapel Lane, Chaucer Way, Eastern Way, Golding Close, High Street, Lodge Road, Lodge Road Upper, Old Gas Works, Primrose Hill, St James Square, St Johns Square, The Doubles, The Hollow, Welton Road Undercroft.
